prompt: A cute anime-style vertical selfie illustration of a smiling young man with short dark brown hair and large round glasses holding a hairless Sphynx cat in a black sling bag outdoors. The man is shown close-up from the left side of the frame, wearing a black hoodie or jacket, with a cheerful open-mouth smile and bright sparkling eyes, as if taking a selfie. His right hand is raised at the top right, lifting a yellow leash strap. The Sphynx cat is centered and tucked inside the front sling bag, with very large ears, pale pink wrinkled skin, big glossy blue-gray eyes, and a calm slightly curious expression. The cat wears a warm brown sweater with tiny colorful confetti-like shapes and a yellow collar or harness. In the background, show the exterior of a modern transit station or large public building with curved steel beams and glass, under a soft blue sky. Add a decorative sign floating near the upper center with the Chinese text “带皮子出去玩” in a cute ornamental frame. Include soft pastel sparkles, tiny hearts, paw-print accents, star shapes, and a subtle lens flare near the lower left to create a warm playful mood. Clean polished line art, soft shading, pastel lighting, glossy highlights on the glasses and eyes, wholesome slice-of-life anime aesthetic, highly appealing social-media illustration.
